original_abstract: Internalizing religious values ​​through the Faithful Friday culture is one of the strategies for strengthening the character of students. This research aims to analyze the religious values ​​internalized in the Faithful Friday culture as an effort to strengthen the character of students at Jalaluddin Vocational School, Wonosobo. This research uses a qualitative descriptive research method. Data was obtained through interviews with school principals, Islamic Religious Education teachers and students at Jalaluddin Wonosobo Vocational School. Data analysis techniques use triangulation of sources and methods. The results of this research show that the Faithful Friday culture contains faith values, worship values, wisdom values ​​which can be internalized by students as an effort to form and improve various characters including caring for the environment, love of peace, leadership and responsibility.
humanized_abstract: Religious values are formed by students through the Faithful Friday culture to strengthen their character. This research is aimed at analyzing religious values formed through the culture of Faithful Friday at Jalaluddin Vocational School in Wonosobo to strengthen the character of students. This research uses a qualitative descriptive method. The source of data is obtained from interviews with school principals, Islamic Religious Education teachers and students of Jalaluddin Wonosobo Vocational School. The data analysis technique uses the triangulation of sources and methods. The results of this study are that the culture of Faithful Friday consists of faith values, worship values, and wisdom values that can be internalized by students to form and improve their character, including caring for the environment, loving peace, leadership and being responsible.
